climate.title: New microbe discovered in Pushkar Lake could help in medicine, farming and climate solutions
climate.description: Central University of Rajasthan researchers discovered new cyanobacteria Pushkarnema curajae in Pushkar Lake, with potential uses in medicine, farming and climate solutions.

climate.title: Poilievre demands Carney cap federal deficit at $31B ahead of spring economic update
climate.description: Ahead of an important fiscal update this week, Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre is demanding Prime Minister Mark Carney cap the federal deficit at $31 billion by eliminating big ticket items like a major rail project and the gun buyback program.

conflict.title: Ahead of PM Modi launch, UP pitches Ganga Expressway as industrial growth corridor
conflict.description: UP pitches the 594-km Ganga Expressway as an industrial corridor with 12 nodes across 12 districts, drawing 987 EOIs worth Rs 46,660 crore ahead of PM Modi’s launch.
